questionHtml:
The rate expression for the reaction X (g) + 2Y (g) → 3Z (g) is 

rate = k[X]0 [Y]2

By which factor will the rate of reaction increase when the concentrations of X and Y are both increased by a factor of 3?

A. 6

B. 9

C. 18

D. 27
